title: Backup alert received
message: INC-2026-00427 reports Critical server backup failed on BKP-JOB-FS-118.

payload.current_state: Last backup failed with checkpoint error; recovery point age is 31 hours.
payload.requested_outcome: Rerun backup from safe checkpoint and validate recovery point freshness.

title: SOP retrieved
message: Check last good recovery point, rerun from checkpoint, avoid deleting backup chains, and validate completion.

payload.title: Failed Backup Job Recovery
controls: Check last successful backup before rerun.
Do not delete backup chains during first response.
Validate job completion and recovery point age.

title: Historical tickets compared
message: 5 similar tickets found; 1 unsafe precedent flagged.

items.summary: Reran incremental job from safe checkpoint.
Cleared transient repository lock after approval.
Engineer deleted old restore points to force a rerun.
items.notes: Unsafe precedent: backup chain was damaged.

items.summary: Rerun failed because repository metadata was corrupt.

title: SOP beats history
message: Unsafe history deleted restore points; SOP requires preserving the backup chain.

blocked_precedent.notes: Unsafe precedent: backup chain was damaged.

title: Safe remediation plan generated

title: RCA and audit evidence generated
message: A transient checkpoint lock caused the scheduled backup to fail.
